meaning: n.即兴诗人,即席演奏者,即席演讲者
examples: He is a composer and improviser.
Payton has a keen perspective on the mind of an improviser, and he lays it all out in this session.
He was not a great improviser, but his solos, painstakingly scripted over long hours in the studio with Springsteen, were set pieces in every show.
